Enum Class SchemaManagementAction

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Enum<SchemaManagementAction>
jakarta.persistence.SchemaManagementAction
All Implemented Interfaces:
Serializable, Comparable<SchemaManagementAction>, Constable
public enum SchemaManagementAction extends Enum<SchemaManagementAction>
Represents an action that can be performed by the schema management tooling.
Since:
4.0

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested classes/interfaces inherited from class Enum

    Enum.EnumDesc<E>

  • Enum Constant Summary

    Enum Constants
    Enum Constant
    Description
    CREATE
    Create the generated database schema.
    DROP
    Drop the generated database schema.
    DROP_AND_CREATE
    Drop and then recreate the generated database schema.
    NONE
    No action.
    POPULATE
    Populate the database with data from the DML load script.
    VALIDATE
    Validate the schema held in the database against the generated schema.

  • Enum Constant Details

    • NONE

      public static final SchemaManagementAction NONE
      No action.

    • CREATE

      public static final SchemaManagementAction CREATE
      Create the generated database schema.
      See Also:
      • SchemaManager.create(boolean)

    • DROP

      public static final SchemaManagementAction DROP
      Drop the generated database schema.
      See Also:
      • SchemaManager.drop(boolean)

    • DROP_AND_CREATE

      public static final SchemaManagementAction DROP_AND_CREATE
      Drop and then recreate the generated database schema.

    • VALIDATE

      public static final SchemaManagementAction VALIDATE
      Validate the schema held in the database against the generated schema.
      See Also:
      • SchemaManager.validate()

    • POPULATE

      public static final SchemaManagementAction POPULATE
      Populate the database with data from the DML load script.
      See Also:
      • Persistence.SchemaManagementProperties.SCHEMAGEN_LOAD_SCRIPT_SOURCE
      • SchemaManager.populate()

    • values

      public static SchemaManagementAction[] values()
      Returns an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared.

      an array containing the constants of this enum class, in the order they are declared

    • valueOf

      public static SchemaManagementAction valueOf(String name)
      Returns the enum constant of this class with the specified name. The string must match exactly an identifier used to declare an enum constant in this class. (Extraneous whitespace characters are not permitted.)
      Parameters:
      name - the name of the enum constant to be returned.
      Returns:
      the enum constant with the specified name
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if this enum class has no constant with the specified name
      NullPointerException - if the argument is null
